# DetailRadius

> DetailRadius is a US marketplace that connects customers with vetted mobile and drop-off auto detailers. Customers compare local detailers with upfront prices, book online in minutes, and pay securely through Stripe with a small deposit. Detailers join free, keep 95% of every job (97% with DetailRadius Pro), and get a full business dashboard with scheduling, payments, analytics, and reviews.

## Book a detailer
- [Find a detailer](https://serene-cupcake-78a254.netlify.app/): search by location, compare prices and reviews, book with a deposit
- [All cities](https://serene-cupcake-78a254.netlify.app/locations.html): every DetailRadius city page in one place
- Packages: Express Detail from $70, Standard Detail from $150, Premium Detail from $280, Ceramic Coating from $400
- Not covered yet? The search offers a waitlist — leave an email and get notified when a detailer reaches your area

## For detailers
- [Become a detailer](https://serene-cupcake-78a254.netlify.app/for-detailers.html): free to join, keep 95% (97% with Pro at $19/mo), deposits stop no-shows, business dashboard included; founding-detailer spots open in every metro above
- [Fleet & business detailing](https://serene-cupcake-78a254.netlify.app/fleet.html): recurring fleet detailing for dealerships, rental lots, and delivery fleets — one invoice
- [Link hub](https://serene-cupcake-78a254.netlify.app/links.html)
